series_metadata.series_description: Comments submitted electronically through the Clearance and Rule Administration (CLARA) system by interested members of the public, and Ohio Department of Job and Family Services (ODJFS) and county staff, in response to draft rules and other draft documents posted on the Clearance Website of ODJFS. Responses by ODJFS staff to comments submitted electronically through the CLARA system by interested members of the public, and ODJFS and county staff, in response to draft rules and other draft documents posted on the Clearance Website of ODJFS.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: no longer of administrative or legal value
